description: Overall, Centercode was on top of the project. The communication was great.
author: Adam G.
pros: The software made it very easy to test what I needed to test.
cons: I would have liked to be alerted when my testing software had updates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Centercode increased my value to the organization
description: Centercode has increased the value my department brings to the organization: -Resolving user experience issues -Resolving technical issues with planned maintenance updates, reducing customer impact -Help manage large enterprise testing programs with up to 5K employee testers -Experiment with new products and services to identify marketing and improvement opportunities -Employees reported over 1K unique issues over the past 6 Months -Easy to establish bi-directional communications with testers -Easy to automate communications and messaging to keep testers engaged and informed
author: Simeon D.
pros: Centercode makes it very easy to establish two-way communication, post notices and follow-ups, with participants. Speed is essential to triage critical impacting issues. Centercode makes it easy to manage the feedback loop and track individual communications in a central repository. The use of automated messaging increases participant engagement. Automate messaging helps to reduce PM communication workload to notify participants/internal members of critical fix/updates on reported issues and to communicate important information.
cons: I dislike lease the user data import form. The more complex our projects become, the greater the need to append different types of data to participant project profile for faster triage. The import process is cumbersome, and does not work well with large amounts of data. It does not provide sufficient error messaging to alert user of specific issues with imported data.

review_title: Good potential but steep learning curve.
description: I didn't use it too much because I just wanted to get started. However, it took me quite a long time to even get started which is why I don't even have a project going. My colleagues who is using it for a while need to jump in and help me. He is across the ocean which doesn't make things easier.
author: Agnes D.
pros: The fact that customers can add likes, ideas and problems while they are using a system. The fact that customers have a personal profile that they can update and use. It is kind of a user database.
cons: I really struggled to get started. I wanted to create a very quick invitation with a video and a link to an interview in the welcome page. I struggled to understand the big page that was meant to help me how to get started and where to find things. I wasn't sure where to find them in the navigation. Even my colleague who is already using it and he is very confident said that its a steep learning curve.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great product with even greater support
description: When I first began using Centercode, I had not built a relationship with their support and relied solely on the suggested methods of the people in my role before me. At that time, I was not a fan of Centercode and felt the platform was cumbersome; however, once I reached out to Centercode I learned that many of the things I was taught internally were not the right way of doing things and the support TRULY retrained me into how to work with the product. Once I removed my learned bad habits, it changed everything and I am in love with this tool and what it can do. Using this product correctly (which is a loose term, because once you know what it can do, there are so many ways you can use it) has saved me time and my company money and has improved customer engagement in testing.
author: Le' Darien D.
pros: The greatest feature of the platform is the customization and custom automation. If you put in the work to seek what can be done, you will find plenty of ways to automate or simplify so many things. The support is very helpful in getting you on the right path, as well.
cons: My only real complaint about the platform is the process of implementing complex filters. At the time of this writing, creating a complex filter requires cycling through filtering, implementing the filter, then filtering again, etc. In speaking with Centercode, they are already in works of improving this process to be more streamlined and I am confident that will improve this.

description: We've used Centercode for over 10 years now for pre-release validation of the majority of our software products; it enables us to quickly identify design/implementation/quality issues & ensure that they are addressed prior to release. We always release with confidence. More importantly it has been a vital mechanism for us to establish some extremely critical business relationships with our customers. Without Centercode our ability to engage with our customers would be severely limited. I consider it to be mission critical for us. Our relationship with Centercode has been mutually beneficial; we enjoy a very close relationship & this results in our enhancement & support requests being resolved in a very timely manner. The whole ethos of this company & their resulting products & services cannot be understated; this starts with the CEO & runs throughout the company. A real pleasure to partner with them.
author: Chris M.
pros: Centercode is infinitely configurable especially with the most recent integration capabilities. It's always the first software product I go to when challenged with a new way to engage with our customers. Invariably when others can't find the answers/info they need from "their" systems I can use the Centercode capabilities to achieve the desired results.
cons: Quite a steep learning curve for new users.

review_title: Great product, great people, great company!
description: Cetnercode's platform has allowed us to become more efficient and consistent in how we evaluate our products prior to market launch. They have provided top notch support and are always happy to have a conversation or extend their knowledge to their user base on best practices or alternate ways of accomplishing a goal Great product, great people, great company.
author: Ryan S.
pros: The platform offered by Centercode is extremely adaptable to various business needs related to product validation. They take a lot of guess work out of the tests we run by providing general templates and industry knowledge. The platform itself allows for customization and has supported all of our needs over the years Their support team is top notch and the rest of their employees are excellent to interact with. Truly a top notch product and company
cons: It is so powerful that sometimes a user can get lost or not understand the repercussions of an action they take. I suppose this is a good problem but can take a while to on-board a new employee and get them up to speed on the intricacies and capabilities of the platform

review_title: Good software but coud be great
description: Good experience but it can be a challenge as a UK user due to the time difference for support. Also the lack of an app, it's really needed now to allow trialists the ability to quickly feedback via their devices. Overall though it does what you need just sometimes takes longer than you'd think it'd take
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Has the basic features that allow you to effectively manage a trial
cons: Lack of intuitive features and a more user friendly CX

description: After 3 months you get used to it and all features are really great and helpful.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: easy to define criteria and the perfect tool for communication with lots of people/
cons: It is not very straight forward and hard to find out all features. You need to be trained in each single/simple steps. Otherwise, you can not find easily what you need.

description: Apart from the initial headwinds, it has been pretty good in obtaining the quality feedback
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The flexibility of the tool that lets me customize the beta project in a specific way that I want it to. Has a comprehensive list of all the features that I can think of are required for beta testing
cons: Some features are complicated to understand

description: It's alright but kinda average comparing with others.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The survey functions which is user friendly for average users.
cons: Hard to embed to other platform such as Jira

description: Excellent people to work with. Always prompt, courteous, and professional to deal with.
author: James S.
pros: Excellent collaboration tool with our beta customers. Tool is the back bone at how we interact and collect data from our beta customer testers
cons: The reporting module really needs some help. It is almost unusable as it is impossible to manipulate / customize look and feel of charts and tables into usable / publishable reports. The tool needs the ability to export report data into customized PowerPoint template. Because of the reporting limitations, I typically export the data out into CSV files and then manipulate it in Excel as work around. This creates extra work on my part as I have to hand build weekly beta reports in PowerPoint using the Excel charts and tables. I see this as the biggest limitation with the tool. If Centercode can improve this then the tool would get 5 / 5 stars easily.

review_title: Make Field Trials easier by using Centercode
description: I have been involved with the field trials (alpha/beta tests) for my company for almost three years now and Centercode has made things really easy. The process to create a project and enroll testers is very streamlined and a smooth experience for testers. Seeing the amount of participation helps us make informed decisions about our upcoming products.
author: Miguel O.
pros: Large pool of testers. Simple user interface. Easy to manage to different groups of testers. Great reporting options.
cons: Unable to merge different Beta projects seamlessly. Support for only one language per project.

description: Overall our experiences with Centercode have been exceptional
author: Keith G.
pros: The ability to create macros to perform smaller functions is always very helpful..
cons: While it's simple on the surface, it can be quite complicated the deeper to dig into it. Which can be good, but in order to get anything working as you'd like it, there always feels like there is a larger overhead of 'programming' it to do what you want.

description: Overall, I like this tool, but like any tool we still feel it needs to modify some of features that we use daily
author: Dolores T.
pros: I like the way I can use filters to pull specific information based on the questionnaire we provide testers
cons: Not all features are intuitive. Meeting with the teams who use this tool daily will bring an improved prospective as to what could be improved.

author: Meghana D.
pros: This software gives a complete end to end perfection about the product , make life easier
cons: Some of the features like passing dynamic value from customer end wrt any key values, make some more automation like creating the project,survey via api.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience is pretty good. The reporting feature is great.
author: Ashar K.
pros: The tool is very robust and can do a lot.
cons: Sometimes too complicated and there are serious feature enhancements that need to be added ASAP to improve the UX.

review_title: Centercode user exprience needs improvement. Its very hard to find features/settings in a project
description: Centercode is a very powerful project management tool but is too customizable at some points that it's hard to get the basic stuff done because you have to navigate through many screens to accomplish your goal.
author: Rami B.
pros: It is very customizable. You can create very custom feedback forms, informational education for users and change the behavior of each project managed in centercode if needed.
cons: User experience needs to be improved. Its very hard to find how to change a setting for a project. I'm unable to find which screen/page contains the settings/customization that I'm looking for. Its easy to get lost while navigating through the various options of a project. It's also hard to invite someone to a specific project if you have multiple projects in centercode. The invite screen has some options that are not clear and sometimes I wasn't able to invite a coworker to the project. Developer documentation and experience need to be improved as well. As a developer trying to implement an external feedback form on a mobile app that would submit to a centercode project is quite complicated. For example I wasn't able to turn off email validation (I want users to be able to submit feedback even if they aren't invited to the specific project).

description: • Track beta customer enrollment • Facilitate communication with beta customers • Systematically collect and respond to beta feedback • Reporting and visibility of beta feedback • Deliver customer specific test builds • Deliver beta documentation and help guides
author: Tyler A.
pros: First, and foremost, the embedded customer service feature is fantastic. I also appreciate the ability to customize welcome message (HTML capable), and email templates.
cons: Often confusing how to customize roles, permissions, or visibility of certain features. This can also be a strength, but it isn't always intuitive how to configure without thorough review of documentation or reaching out to the

description: Excellent Team to work with, b ig community to capture your feedback.
author: Manoj J.
pros: Ease of integration with the enterprise databases, bug management system and how to categorize those issues so that user don't see duplicates.
cons: Few survey drafting features need improvement. Those are corner cases and everyone may not need those.

review_title: A complex yet simplifying tool (with even more potential)
author: Mazen A.
pros: The ease of use from a user's perspective
cons: The missing abilities I expected from the tool

review_title: Doesn't fit well for the current setup
author: Vishal K.
pros: Target users management is good with CenterCode
cons: It doesn't serve very well with the current end to end process we have for feedback collection

description: Centercode was instrumental in helping us identify a pool of beta testing candidates to support new product testing prior to launch.
author: Sharon R.
pros: The ease of set up and use and the fantastic support teams
cons: Analytics could have been a little more robust or easier to export and analyze.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: James A.
pros: I didn't like anything about it. It didn't seem to solve whatever problem we used it for.
cons: Everything. I was whole heartedly dissatisfied

review_title: Solid features, but clunky user experience
author: Drew M.
pros: I appreciate that Centercode makes it easy to invite beta participants, manage reports bugs and suggestions and add tasks and reminders for participants.
cons: Many features are difficult to find and use, and don't seem to be intuitively organized. For example, all features relating to sending emails to participants should be in one place.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am happy with the product but the UI and the user friendliness can be improved
author: RAji K.
pros: Once you know how to create the reports its pretty good.
cons: Creating reports was not easy. you can make the report creation a bit more user friendly Often we experience centercode not available.
